description:
- Mijing 4-in-1 BGA Reballing Stencil Platform for iPhone 16/16 Plus /16 Pro/16Pro Max / 16E is convenient and faster for reballing BGA without any damage, offers you the best solution for iPhone 16 series BGA reballing and repairing
How to use:
- Install the main board on the platform
- Cover the BGA reballing stencil on the mainboard
- Evenly spread tin on the cover of the reballing stencil
- Remove the reballing stencil cover
- Take out the motherboard and cooperate with the hot air gun to solidify the tin point

title: SUNSHINE SS-909 Universal Battery Activation Charging Board For iPhone 7-16 Pro Max / Ipad
description:
Brand: SUNSHINE
Model: SS-909
- Exclusive initiative motherboard design ,suitable for most of mobile model and ipad model
- Battery fully charger can turn automatically-power off, to prevent overcharging
- Dual Displays: current display, voltage display
- Load voltage and current display
- Automatic recognition of battery positive and negative
- Automatic internal adjustment of the voltage and current display module
- Exclusive initiative battery discharge function
- Enhanced USB upgrade expansion design
- Can connect to the Power supply with 2A USB, also can connect the smart charger
- Quick charge and smart charge distinction
- A number of utility model patents and exterior design patents
Package includes:
Motherboard*1
Board*4
Power cable*1

title: Mijing Z20 Pro 4-in-1 Motherboard Middle Layer Planting Tin Platform for iPhone 16 Series
description:
- Mijing 4-in-1 BGA Reballing Stencil Platform for iPhone 16/16 Plus /16 Pro/16Pro Max / 16E is convenient and faster for reballing BGA without any damage, offers you the best solution for iPhone 16 series BGA reballing and repairing
How to use:
- Install the main board on the platform
- Cover the BGA reballing stencil on the mainboard
- Evenly spread tin on the cover of the reballing stencil
- Remove the reballing stencil cover
- Take out the motherboard and cooperate with the hot air gun to solidify the tin point

iPhone 16, 16 Pro, 16PLus, 16 Pro Max, 16E

description:
Brand: RELIFE
Model: RL-044
Half-Cut Design, Precise Alignment: The real machine is measured to ensure accuracy. Each mesh is calibrated according to the original drawings to ensure that every solder joint is not missing; the special chip is half-cut and designed to block the remaining tin to meet different requirements
Round and Full: It is specially designed and used for mobile phone chips. The round and square precise hole positions make the solder balls more rounded and meet the tin planting requirements for various chips
Ultra-thin and Super Tough: Ultra-thin design, better ft of tin planting, continuous bending, and full toughness
IP Series CPU Tin Planting Set: Suitable for IP6-17
High Temperature and Wear Resistance: High-quality special steel is selected, which has good high-temperature resistance and metal fatigue resistance, so that each tin point is heated evenly
Precision Hole Pitch Design: The round and square precise hole position makes the solder balls more rounded and prevents the mesh holes from jamming the solder balls
